default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review a new long-tail SEO strategy and discuss its feasibility.](https://fathom.video/share/UT_v-wywsZ68-yEYqk34c45QSB8VCQd8?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New SEO Strategy:** Growth X proposed a long-tail content strategy (glossaries, health info) to build domain authority and capture traffic from both traditional search and LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/UT_v-wywsZ68-yEYqk34c45QSB8VCQd8?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)
  - [**Regulatory Risk is the Blocker:** The strategy is contingent on Biologica's ability to publish general health info without the standard, product-related medical review process, which would make the plan unscalable.](https://fathom.video/share/UT_v-wywsZ68-yEYqk34c45QSB8VCQd8?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [**Phased Rollout:** To avoid overwhelming Google's index, content will be published slowly (10–15 articles/week). A simple tag-based structure will be used initially to prioritize content creation over complex site architecture.](https://fathom.video/share/UT_v-wywsZ68-yEYqk34c45QSB8VCQd8?tab=summary&timestamp=599.0)
  - [**Pipeline Improvements:** Growth X will fix a recurring "Lynx" linking error in the content pipeline and analyze recent reviewer feedback to improve future output.](https://fathom.video/share/UT_v-wywsZ68-yEYqk34c45QSB8VCQd8?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)

## Topics

### New SEO Strategy Proposal

  - [Growth X proposed a long-tail content strategy to build domain authority and capture traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/UT_v-wywsZ68-yEYqk34c45QSB8VCQd8?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)
  - [**Content Pillars:**](https://fathom.video/share/UT_v-wywsZ68-yEYqk34c45QSB8VCQd8?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
      - [**Glossary Definitions:** Low-risk, high-value content for LLM snippets.](https://fathom.video/share/UT_v-wywsZ68-yEYqk34c45QSB8VCQd8?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
      - [**General Health Information:** Educational content on topics like perimenopause.](https://fathom.video/share/UT_v-wywsZ68-yEYqk34c45QSB8VCQd8?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
      - [**Ingredient Deep Dives:** Detailed articles on product ingredients.](https://fathom.video/share/UT_v-wywsZ68-yEYqk34c45QSB8VCQd8?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
      - [**Product Comparisons:** Articles comparing Biologica to competitors (optional).](https://fathom.video/share/UT_v-wywsZ68-yEYqk34c45QSB8VCQd8?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [**Data-Driven Approach:**](https://fathom.video/share/UT_v-wywsZ68-yEYqk34c45QSB8VCQd8?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
      - [Strategy is based on standard keyword research plus Growth X's internal LLM visibility tool.](https://fathom.video/share/UT_v-wywsZ68-yEYqk34c45QSB8VCQd8?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
      - [This tool analyzes competitor performance in LLM search to identify high-potential topics.](https://fathom.video/share/UT_v-wywsZ68-yEYqk34c45QSB8VCQd8?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)

### Regulatory & Review Feasibility

  - [**Primary Blocker:** The strategy's viability depends on whether Biologica can publish general health info without the standard medical review process.](https://fathom.video/share/UT_v-wywsZ68-yEYqk34c45QSB8VCQd8?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [**Proposed Solution:** Publish content as general information, completely separate from product claims, and include a "not medical advice" disclaimer.](https://fathom.video/share/UT_v-wywsZ68-yEYqk34c45QSB8VCQd8?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [**Risk Mitigation:** Growth X is exploring using Maggie's past feedback to build a knowledge base for automated content checks, reducing the need for manual review.](https://fathom.video/share/UT_v-wywsZ68-yEYqk34c45QSB8VCQd8?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [**Specific Concerns:**](https://fathom.video/share/UT_v-wywsZ68-yEYqk34c45QSB8VCQd8?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
      - [**Ingredient Deep Dives:** Past content on this topic required extensive rewrites from Maggie for accuracy, raising concerns about scalability.](https://fathom.video/share/UT_v-wywsZ68-yEYqk34c45QSB8VCQd8?tab=summary&timestamp=465.0)
      - [**Product Comparisons:** A philosophical decision for Biologica; not a mandatory part of the strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/UT_v-wywsZ68-yEYqk34c45QSB8VCQd8?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)

### Implementation Plan

  - [**Site Architecture:**](https://fathom.video/share/UT_v-wywsZ68-yEYqk34c45QSB8VCQd8?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)
      - [**Initial Plan:** Use the existing Shopify blog template and path (`/blogs/health`).](https://fathom.video/share/UT_v-wywsZ68-yEYqk34c45QSB8VCQd8?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)
      - [**Simplified Approach:** Publish all new content within the existing "Wellness Center" blog.](https://fathom.video/share/UT_v-wywsZ68-yEYqk34c45QSB8VCQd8?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Prioritizes content creation over complex architecture.](https://fathom.video/share/UT_v-wywsZ68-yEYqk34c45QSB8VCQd8?tab=summary&timestamp=1002.0)
          - [**Method:** Use tags (e.g., "glossary") to categorize articles. The Wellness Center page can then be updated to display content based on these tags.](https://fathom.video/share/UT_v-wywsZ68-yEYqk34c45QSB8VCQd8?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [**Publishing Cadence:**](https://fathom.video/share/UT_v-wywsZ68-yEYqk34c45QSB8VCQd8?tab=summary&timestamp=599.0)
      - [**Rationale:** A slow, steady rollout avoids overwhelming Google's index and appearing unnatural for a new domain.](https://fathom.video/share/UT_v-wywsZ68-yEYqk34c45QSB8VCQd8?tab=summary&timestamp=599.0)
      - [**Pacing:** 10–15 articles per week.](https://fathom.video/share/UT_v-wywsZ68-yEYqk34c45QSB8VCQd8?tab=summary&timestamp=599.0)
      - [**Monitoring:** Track Google's indexing rate in Search Console to adjust the pace as needed.](https://fathom.video/share/UT_v-wywsZ68-yEYqk34c45QSB8VCQd8?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)

### Pipeline & Content Quality

  - [**Lynx Linking Error:**](https://fathom.video/share/UT_v-wywsZ68-yEYqk34c45QSB8VCQd8?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
